explanation: This command uses the -backupkey flag and includes a file path with quotes to simulate a typical usage of SharpDPAPI while applying safe mutation techniques like substitution of long flags to short flags and insertion of quotes.
This command uses alternative flag syntax (forward slashes) and reorders arguments to demonstrate how the Sigma rule might be bypassed through substitution and reordering techniques.
This command omits non-essential arguments and uses substitution of long flags to short flags, demonstrating how the Sigma rule can be bypassed while maintaining the core functionality.
